title: olea javanica
intro: Olea javanica, also known as Javan olive or wild olive, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to Indonesia and Malaysia. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olea javanica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and fruits can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal and health benefits.
